title: Agricultural Biotechnology in Development: Challenges and Opportunities
summary: Testimony of Calestous Juma for the Committee on Agriculture, U.S. House of Representatives. Hearing on Artificial Barriers to U.S. Agricultural Trade and Foreign Food Assistance, March 26, 2003.
